projectDescription: A cross-platform desktop app that unifies provider management, MCP servers, Skills, Sessions, and proxy failover for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and OpenClaw.
keyFeatures: One-click provider switching for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and OpenClaw
50+ built-in provider presets including AWS Bedrock, NVIDIA NIM, and community relays
Unified MCP server management with bidirectional sync across all apps
Skills management with one-click install from GitHub repos or ZIP files
Local proxy with auto-failover, circuit breaker, and API format conversion
Usage dashboard with token tracking, cost estimation, and request logs
System tray quick switching without opening the full app
Cloud sync via Dropbox, OneDrive, iCloud, or WebDAV
Deep Link (ccswitch://) protocol for one-click configuration sharing
Session Manager to browse and restore conversation history across all apps
publicApiSurface: ccswitch://v1/import (Deep Link protocol for provider/MCP/prompt/skill import)
Local proxy HTTP endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:15721
Tauri IPC commands: provider, mcp, skill, prompt, proxy, session_manager, usage, deeplink, settings, sync
